Golf 6.notes: OEM Spark plugs: 03C905601A. Check timing chain tensioner.
DQ200 dry dual-clutch. Requires regular mechatronic fluid inspection.
N75 valve inspection recommended if boost lag occurs.
End of Golf 6 production year. Highly stable software version.
Common rail engine. Wet clutch DSG requires fluid change every 60k km.
Check EGR valve cleaning intervals to maintain DPF efficiency.
Highly economical engine. Piezo injectors require high-quality fuel filter changes.

Golf 7.notes: EA211 engine family with timing belt (not chain). Smooth actuation.
ACT (Active Cylinder Management) checking via OBD scanner recommended.
EA888 Gen 3 engine. High thermal efficiency. Check water pump housing for leaks.
Electronic differential lock (VAQ) fluid service needed if tracking.

Passat B8.notes: AdBlue system integration. Euro 6 compliant technical parameters.
EA211 Evo engine. Uses Miller combustion cycle and variable turbine geometry.

A3 8V.notes: Dual injection system (MPI + FSI). Solves carbon buildup on intake valves.
Haldex Generation 5 AWD system. Service Haldex coupling every 3 years.

A4 B9.notes: B-Cycle combustion engine optimized for fuel efficiency. Wet dual-clutch transmission.

3 Series F30.notes: TwinPower Turbo. Monitor oil feed lines and timing chain guide wear.
Diesel variant. Highly robust torque converter transmission parameters.
